title: Culinary Wilds
description: A modpack that mixes extra survival challenges with your favorite culinary additions!
body:
![CULINARY WILDS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3750ac9180c91e88e7db87b6ca7747cf5534de3.png)

Culinary Wilds is a Minecraft modpack created by Keta. This modpack mixes things up by combining extra survival challenges with advanced cooking and meal options! Things like thirst, dietary needs, extra tools for wood, are all essential when needing to survive in this modpack. Some mods include :

- Farmer's Delight
- Thirst
- Survivalist Essentials
- Tectonic
- And many more addons and extras!

If you make a video or review on this modpack, please make sure to credit me and the mod creators that are a part of this pack :)
